caption_enhanced: The figure shows a bar chart with five categories (liq, lam, lxs, hex, and gyr) on the x-axis and percent classified on the y-axis. The categories are represented by different colors and their corresponding values are shown on the y-axis.
key_finding: The most important result shown is that the category 'hex' has the highest percentage of being classified as 'gyr' with over 90%.
